specific_mechanism: Chappe telegraph cascade: arm positions encode characters; relay-cascade across hilltop stations propagates a message across France in hours
llm_application: LLM inference relay cascade: each layer encodes token states via 'arm positions'; relay-cascade propagates message across the model's depth in microseconds.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes semaphore-codes information-cascade mapping as proposed.
